name: @aily-project/board-xiao_esp32c6
description: The Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32C6 is based on the ESP32-C6 RISC-V single-core processor at up to 160 MHz, supporting Wi-Fi 6 (2.4 GHz), Bluetooth 5.0 LE, Zigbee 3.0, and Thread 1.3 (IEEE 802.15.4) protocols, with 4 MB Flash, low-power deep sleep mode (as low as 15 uA), lithium battery charge management, and a compact XIAO form factor (21x17.8 mm).
author: Seeed
